disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Chest tightness and a racing, pounding heart began within hours of witnessing a same-age colleague collapse and die at work today.
trigger_question_examples: When did the chest tightness start?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started this afternoon, not long after I watched my colleague drop dead at his desk. My chest went tight and my heart started pounding and it hasn't really stopped.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Accompanying diaphoresis, fast breathing, trembling and an overwhelming sense of dread.
trigger_question_examples: What else are you feeling along with the chest tightness?
How are you feeling in yourself right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm sweating, I can't stop shaking, I'm breathing really fast and I've got this awful feeling that something terrible is about to happen.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No history of exertional chest pain or tightness; symptoms are new and tied to today's event, not to physical exertion.
trigger_question_examples: Have you ever had chest tightness when walking uphill, climbing stairs or exercising?
Has anything like this ever happened before today?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, never — I've never had chest pain with exercise or anything like it before. This only came on after what happened today.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The chest tightness eases somewhat with reassurance and slow breathing and fluctuates with anxious thoughts, rather than being fixed or exertional.
trigger_question_examples: Does anything make the tightness better or worse?
Does it change when you calm down or when you think about what happened?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: When my wife talks me down and I breathe slowly it eases off a bit, but the moment I think about him it comes straight back.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lifestyle cardiovascular risk factors — regular above-guideline alcohol intake, poor diet, and a sedentary desk-based routine.
trigger_question_examples: Can you tell me a bit about your drinking, diet and exercise?
What does a typical week look like for alcohol and activity?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Honestly not great — I drink a few most nights, I eat a lot of takeaway, and I barely move all day at my desk.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Patient was well and asymptomatic before today, with no acute medical complaint driving the contact other than the panic reaction.
trigger_question_examples: Before today, had you been feeling unwell at all?
Were there any symptoms before your colleague's death?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I was completely fine before this — it all started with the shock of what happened at work today.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Uncertain about family history of premature cardiovascular disease and unsure of his own cancer-screening participation status.
trigger_question_examples: Is there any heart disease in your family, especially at a young age?
Have you kept up with any recommended health screening?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I honestly don't know about the family heart stuff, and I haven't really kept up with any of the screening things.
